---
title: "Resume"
description: "Summary of education, experience, and technical skills."
---

## Snapshot 

I leverage the power of remote sensing, geospatial analysis, and forestry in my work. My strengths include turning spatial data into maps and reports for decision-making and further analysis.



## Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)** — "The University of British Columbia"  | <Apirl,2026>  

**Bachelor of Science in Forestry (B.S.F. )** — "The University of British Columbia" | <Apirl,2025>    



## Experience
**Co-op / Internship:**  Summer Student, <Líl’wat Forestry> — <Líl’wat Nation, Mount Currie, BC> | <May-Aug,2024>  



## Technical toolbox
- **GIS & mapping:** ArcGIS Pro / QGIS 
- **Remote sensing:** Raster workflows, LiDAR/ALS, image features  
- **Programming:** R , Python
